playAreaExperiment.value: A highly configurable three-part experimental setup includes a particle source emitter, double-slit barrier, and detector screen. When experiment is running, particles pass through available slits in barrier to land on detector screen and form patterns. You can choose and adjust source particles, configure slitted barrier, and observe and take snapshots of resulting patterns on detector screen. Additionally, a graph of detector screen data can be shown.

playAreaHighIntensity.value: A zoomed-in wave area shows a particle source, double-slit barrier, and detector screen. When the source is on, waves travel through available slits and build a pattern on the detector screen. You can change particle type, slit configuration, wave display, detector view, and measurement tools.

playAreaSingleParticles.value: A zoomed-in wave area shows a single-particle source, double-slit barrier, and detector screen. When the source is on, individual particles travel through available slits and build a hits pattern on the detector screen. You can change particle type, slit configuration, wave display, detector view, and measurement tools.

controlArea.value: Measurement tools can be added or removed to assist with data collection and analysis. Reset sim to start over.

maxHitsReachedHint.value: Clear detector screen to make more observations.

currentDetails.value:
Currently, { $isPlaying ->
  [false] sim is paused. { $isMaxHitsReached ->
    [true] Source is off. Max number of { $sourceType ->
      [photons] photon
      [electrons] electron
      [neutrons] neutron
     *[heliumAtoms] helium atom
    } hits reached. Detector screen shows hits pattern.
   *[false] { $isEmitting ->
      [true] Source emits { $sourceType ->
        [photons] photons
        [electrons] electrons
        [neutrons] neutrons
      *[heliumAtoms] helium atoms
      } directly at double-slit barrier with { $slitSetting ->
        [bothOpen] both slits open
        [leftCovered] { $slitOrientation ->
          [topBottom] top slit covered
         *[leftRight] left slit covered
        }
        [rightCovered] { $slitOrientation ->
          [topBottom] bottom slit covered
         *[leftRight] right slit covered
        }
        [leftDetector] { $slitOrientation ->
          [topBottom] detector on top slit
         *[leftRight] detector on left slit
        }
        [rightDetector] { $slitOrientation ->
          [topBottom] detector on bottom slit
         *[leftRight] detector on right slit
        }
        [noBarrier] no barrier
       *[bothDetectors] detectors on both slits
      }. { $detectionMode ->
        [intensity] { $hasHits ->
          [true] Detector screen shows intensity pattern.
         *[false] Detector screen is empty.
        }
       *[hits] { $hasHits ->
          [false] Detector screen has no hits.
         *[true] Detector screen shows hits pattern.
        }
      }
     *[false] Source is off. { $detectionMode ->
        [intensity] Detector screen is empty.
       *[hits] { $hasHits ->
          [false] Detector screen is empty.
         *[true] Detector screen shows hits pattern.
        }
      }
    }
  }
 *[true] { $isMaxHitsReached ->
    [true] source is off. Max number of { $sourceType ->
      [photons] photon
      [electrons] electron
      [neutrons] neutron
     *[heliumAtoms] helium atom
    } hits reached. Detector screen shows hits pattern.
   *[false] { $isEmitting ->
      [true] source emits { $sourceType ->
        [photons] photons
        [electrons] electrons
        [neutrons] neutrons
      *[heliumAtoms] helium atoms
      } directly at double-slit barrier with { $slitSetting ->
        [bothOpen] both slits open
        [leftCovered] { $slitOrientation ->
          [topBottom] top slit covered
         *[leftRight] left slit covered
        }
        [rightCovered] { $slitOrientation ->
          [topBottom] bottom slit covered
         *[leftRight] right slit covered
        }
        [leftDetector] { $slitOrientation ->
          [topBottom] detector on top slit
         *[leftRight] detector on left slit
        }
        [rightDetector] { $slitOrientation ->
          [topBottom] detector on bottom slit
         *[leftRight] detector on right slit
        }
        [noBarrier] no barrier
       *[bothDetectors] detectors on both slits
      }. { $detectionMode ->
        [intensity] { $hasHits ->
          [true] Detector screen shows intensity pattern.
         *[false] Detector screen is empty.
        }
       *[hits] { $hasHits ->
          [false] Detector screen has no hits.
         *[true] Detector screen shows hits pattern.
        }
      }
     *[false] source is off. { $detectionMode ->
        [intensity] Detector screen is empty.
       *[hits] { $hasHits ->
          [false] Detector screen is empty.
         *[true] Detector screen shows hits pattern.
        }
      }
    }
  }
}

leadingParagraph.value:
{ $detectorScreenStatus ->

    [photons] Photon
    [electrons] Electron
    [neutrons] Neutron
   *[heliumAtoms] Helium atom

  [emptyWavePropagating] { a11y_experimentDetectorScreenDetails_displaySurface } is empty.
 *[pattern] { a11y_experimentDetectorScreenDetails_displaySurface } shows { $detectionMode ->
    [intensity] an intensity pattern
   *[hits] a hits pattern
  } of a { $sourceType ->
    [photons] photon
    [electrons] electron
    [neutrons] neutron
   *[heliumAtoms] helium atom
  } experiment.
}

accessibleHelpText.value: Use added detector probe to measure probability of detecting particle in circular region of wave area.

photonDetail.value: Photon wavelength is { $wavelength }, in the { $color } zone.

particleDetail.value:
{ $sourceType ->
  [electrons] Electron
  [neutrons] Neutron
 *[heliumAtoms] Helium atom
} speed is { $speed }. Effective matter wavelength is about { $wavelength }.

slits.value:
{ $slitSetting ->
  [bothOpen] Both slits are open. Slit separation is { $separation }.
  [leftCovered] Top slit is covered. Wave fronts emerge from bottom slit only.
  [rightCovered] Bottom slit is covered. Wave fronts emerge from top slit only.
  [leftDetector] Top slit has a detector.
  [rightDetector] Bottom slit has a detector.
  [noBarrier] No barrier is between source and detector screen.
 *[bothDetectors] Both slits have detectors.
}

detectorPattern.value:
{ $isEmitting ->
  [false] Source is off, so there is no pattern on the detector.
 *[true] { $detectionMode ->
    [intensity] { $patternFormation ->
      [empty] No pattern has reached the detector screen yet.
      [forming] { $patternKind ->
        [doubleSlitInterference] Evenly-spaced bright bands form on detector screen.
        [singleSlitDiffraction] { $slitSetting ->
          [leftCovered] Wide bright area forms on lower part of detector screen.
         *[rightCovered] Wide bright area forms on upper part of detector screen.
        }
        [whichPathDiffraction] Wide bright area forms on detector screen.
       *[noBarrier] { $waveDisplayMode ->
          [amplitude] Solid wave forms uniform glow on detector screen.
         *[electricField] Plane wave fronts form uniform glow on detector screen.
          [realPart] Plane wave fronts form uniform glow on detector screen.
          [imaginaryPart] Plane wave fronts form uniform glow on detector screen.
        }
      }
      [complete] { $patternKind ->
        [doubleSlitInterference] Across detector screen bright bands are evenly spaced and { $bandSpacing ->
          [extremelyFarApart] extremely far apart
          [veryFarApart] very far apart
          [farApart] far apart
          [somewhatCloseTogether] somewhat close together
          [closeTogether] close together
          [veryCloseTogether] very close together
         *[extremelyCloseTogether] extremely close together
        }, { $envelope ->
          [clusteringIntoTwoFaintSections] clustering into two faint sections, directly across from slits
          [clusteringIntoTwoDistinctSections] clustering into two distinct sections, directly across from slits
         *[brightestAtCenter] brightest band at center
        }.
        [singleSlitDiffraction] { $slitSetting ->
          [leftCovered] Across lower part of detector screen is a wide bright area fading toward edges,
          brightest part at center.
         *[rightCovered] Across upper part of detector screen is a wide bright area fading toward edges,
          brightest part at center.
        }
        [whichPathDiffraction] { $envelope ->
          [clusteringIntoTwoFaintSections] Across detector screen are two bright areas, directly across from the slits, each fading toward its edges.
          [clusteringIntoTwoDistinctSections] Across detector screen are two distinct bright areas, directly across from the slits, each fading toward its edges.
         *[brightestAtCenter] Across detector screen is a wide bright area fading toward edges, brightest part at center.
        }
       *[noBarrier] Across detector screen is a uniform glow from edge to edge.
      }
      [paused] Detector pattern formation is paused.
      [notApplicable] Detector pattern does not apply to the current setup.
     *[collectingHits] Detector pattern is collecting hits.
    }
   *[hits] { $hitStage ->
      [none] Detector screen is empty. No particles have arrived yet.
      [few] Individual scattered hits appear. Total hits: { $hitCount }.
      [emerging] { $patternKind ->
        [doubleSlitInterference] Hits begin forming faint bands.
        [singleSlitDiffraction] Bright-band pattern is absent.
        [whichPathDiffraction] Bright bands are gone.
       *[noBarrier] Evenly scattered hits appear across the detector screen.
      } Total hits: { $hitCount }.
      [developing] { $patternKind ->
        [doubleSlitInterference] { $envelope ->
          [clusteringIntoTwoFaintSections] Hits form evenly spaced bands clustering into two faint sections, directly across from slits.
          [clusteringIntoTwoDistinctSections] Hits form evenly spaced bands clustering into two distinct sections, directly across from slits.
         *[brightestAtCenter] Hits form evenly spaced bands.
        }
        [singleSlitDiffraction] Bright-band pattern is absent.
        [whichPathDiffraction] { $envelope ->
          [clusteringIntoTwoFaintSections] Bright bands are gone. Hits collect in two areas, directly across from the slits.
          [clusteringIntoTwoDistinctSections] Bright bands are gone. Hits collect in two distinct areas, directly across from the slits.
         *[brightestAtCenter] Bright bands are gone.
        }
       *[noBarrier] Evenly scattered hits collect across the detector screen.
      } Total hits: { $hitCount }.
     *[clear] { $patternKind ->
        [doubleSlitInterference] { $envelope ->
          [clusteringIntoTwoFaintSections] Hits form evenly spaced bands clustering into two faint sections, directly across from slits.
          [clusteringIntoTwoDistinctSections] Hits form evenly spaced bands clustering into two distinct sections, directly across from slits.
         *[brightestAtCenter] Hits form evenly spaced bands.
        }
        [singleSlitDiffraction] Bright-band pattern is absent.
        [whichPathDiffraction] { $envelope ->
          [clusteringIntoTwoFaintSections] Bright bands are gone. Hits collect in two areas, directly across from the slits.
          [clusteringIntoTwoDistinctSections] Bright bands are gone. Hits collect in two distinct areas, directly across from the slits.
         *[brightestAtCenter] Bright bands are gone.
        }
       *[noBarrier] Evenly scattered hits collect across the detector screen.
      } Total hits: { $hitCount }.
    }
  }
}

sourceStarted.value:
{ $isPlaying ->
  [false] Source started. Sim is paused.
 *[true] Source started on { $timeSpeed } speed.
}

sourceStopped.value:
{ $hasHitsData ->
  [true] Source off. Hits data remain.
 *[false] Source off.
}

particleTypeChanged.value:
{ $sourceType ->
  [photons] Photon
  [electrons] Electron
  [neutrons] Neutron
 *[heliumAtoms] Helium atom
} experiment { $isEmitting ->
  [true] in progress.
 *[false] ready to start.
}

detectionModeChanged.value:
{ $detectionMode ->
  [intensity] Intensity selected. The predicted pattern is shown continuously.
 *[hits] Hits selected. Individual particle impacts build the pattern statistically.
}

slitConfigurationChanged.value:
{ $isRestarting ->
  [true] { $sourceRestartedResponse }
 *[false] { $slitSetting ->
    [bothOpen] In barrier, both slits open.
    [leftCovered] In barrier, top slit covered.
    [rightCovered] In barrier, bottom slit covered.
    [leftDetector] Detector added to top slit in barrier.
    [rightDetector] Detector added to bottom slit in barrier.
    [noBarrier] Barrier removed from experiment.
   *[bothDetectors] Detectors added to both slits in barrier.
  }
}

waveDisplayChanged.value:
Wave display changed to { $waveDisplayMode ->
  [electricField] Electric Field.
  [realPart] Real Part.
  [imaginaryPart] Imaginary Part.
 *[amplitude] Amplitude.
}

toolChanged.value:
{ $tool ->
  [measuringTape] Measuring tape
  [stopwatch] Stopwatch
  [timePlot] Time plot
 *[positionPlot] Position plot
} { $isVisible ->
  [true] shown.
 *[false] hidden.
}

hitStageChanged.value:
Hits pattern is now { $hitStage ->
  [none] empty.
  [few] showing individual scattered hits.
  [emerging] { $patternKind ->
    [noBarrier] showing evenly scattered hits.
   *[doubleSlitInterference] forming faint bands.
    [singleSlitDiffraction] showing a broad central area.
    [whichPathDiffraction] showing a broad central area.
  }
  [developing] { $patternKind ->
    [noBarrier] showing evenly scattered hits.
   *[doubleSlitInterference] forming evenly spaced bands.
    [singleSlitDiffraction] showing a broad central area.
    [whichPathDiffraction] showing a broad central area.
  }
 *[clear] { $patternKind ->
    [noBarrier] showing evenly scattered hits.
   *[doubleSlitInterference] showing evenly spaced bands.
    [singleSlitDiffraction] showing a broad central area.
    [whichPathDiffraction] showing a broad central area.
  }
}

waveProgressChanged.value:
{ $waveProgressStage ->
  [sourceOff] Source is off, so no wave is traveling.
  [atSlits] { $waveDisplayMode ->
    [amplitude] { $patternKind ->
      [doubleSlitInterference] Solid circular waves emerge from both slits and overlap.
      [singleSlitDiffraction] Solid circular wave emerges from open slit only.
      [whichPathDiffraction] As detection events occur, solid circular waves emerge from both slits one at a time
      and do not interact.
     *[noBarrier] Solid wave moves directly toward the detector screen.
    }
   *[electricField] { $patternKind ->
      [doubleSlitInterference] Circular wave fronts emerge from both slits and overlap.
      [singleSlitDiffraction] Circular wave fronts emerge from open slit only.
      [whichPathDiffraction] As detection events occur, circular wave fronts emerge from both slits
      one at a time and do not interact.
     *[noBarrier] Plane wave fronts move directly toward the detector screen.
    }
    [realPart] { $patternKind ->
      [doubleSlitInterference] Circular wave fronts emerge from both slits and overlap.
      [singleSlitDiffraction] Circular wave fronts emerge from open slit only.
      [whichPathDiffraction] As detection events occur, circular wave fronts emerge from both slits
      one at a time and do not interact.
     *[noBarrier] Plane wave fronts move directly toward the detector screen.
    }
    [imaginaryPart] { $patternKind ->
      [doubleSlitInterference] Circular wave fronts emerge from both slits and overlap.
      [singleSlitDiffraction] Circular wave fronts emerge from open slit only.
      [whichPathDiffraction] As detection events occur, circular wave fronts emerge from both slits
      one at a time and do not interact.
     *[noBarrier] Plane wave fronts move directly toward the detector screen.
    }
  }
  [interferingAfterSlits] { $waveDisplayMode ->
    [amplitude] Overlapping solid circular waves add and cancel, and spread fan-shaped rays toward detector screen.
   *[electricField] Overlapping circular wave fronts add and cancel, and spread checkered pattern toward detector screen.
    [realPart] Overlapping circular wave fronts add and cancel, and spread checkered pattern toward detector screen.
    [imaginaryPart] Overlapping circular wave fronts add and cancel, and spread checkered pattern toward detector screen.
  }
  [diffractingAfterSlits] { $waveDisplayMode ->
    [amplitude] Solid circular wave spreads toward detector screen.
   *[electricField] Circular wave fronts spread toward detector screen.
    [realPart] Circular wave fronts spread toward detector screen.
    [imaginaryPart] Circular wave fronts spread toward detector screen.
  }
  [whichPathAfterSlits] { $waveDisplayMode ->
    [amplitude] Non-interacting solid circular waves spread toward detector screen.
   *[electricField] Non-interacting circular wave fronts spread toward detector screen.
    [realPart] Non-interacting circular wave fronts spread toward detector screen.
    [imaginaryPart] Non-interacting circular wave fronts spread toward detector screen.
  }
  [directToScreen] { $waveDisplayMode ->
    [amplitude] Solid wave moves directly toward the detector screen.
   *[electricField] Plane wave fronts move directly toward the detector screen.
    [realPart] Plane wave fronts move directly toward the detector screen.
    [imaginaryPart] Plane wave fronts move directly toward the detector screen.
  }
 *[hittingScreen] { $waveDisplayMode ->
    [amplitude] Solid wave reached the detector screen.
   *[electricField] Wave fronts reached the detector screen.
    [realPart] Wave fronts reached the detector screen.
    [imaginaryPart] Wave fronts reached the detector screen.
  }
}

maxHitsReached.value: Maximum number of hits reached. Source is off. Clear detector screen to make more observations.

reset.value: Experiment reset. Source is off and detector screen is empty.

  [true] on.
 *[false] off.
}

detectionMode.value:
Screen Detection set to { $detectionMode ->

 *[hits] Hits Mode.

slitConfiguration.value:

  [rightCovered] { $slitOrientation ->

  }

{ $isEmitting ->

 *[false] { $sourceType ->
    [photons] Turn source on to start experiment.
    [electrons] Turn source on to start experiment. Electron mass is 9.1

Add ruler to measure distances on detector screen or graph. Once added, move ruler up or down with keyboard shortcuts.
Add measuring tape to measure distances on detector screen or graph. Once added, move with keyboard shortcuts.
Add stopwatch to time experiment. Once added, Start, Pause, Reset Stopwatch, and move with keyboard shortcuts.
Use added time plot to graph wave value at position over time.
Use added position plot to graph wave value across positions in wave area.
Move probe to choose which point of wave area is graphed over time.
Move chart to a convenient position.

} at probe position versus time.

accessibleHelpText.value: Move probe up or down to choose which row of wave area is graphed.

Choose continuous intensity pattern or individual hits pattern for particle detection.

{ $isEmitting ->
  [true] Individual hits increasing on detector screen.
 *[false] Screen is empty. Start particle source.
}

simSpeedDescription.value: Choose Normal or Fast speed. In Hits mode, Fast collects hits more quickly for faster data collection.

accessibleHelpText.value: Change particle type for source emitter and change experiment setup.

accessibleContextResponse.value:
{ $isMaxHitsReached ->
  [true] { $sourceType ->
    [photons] Photon
    [electrons] Electron
    [neutrons] Neutron
   *[heliumAtoms] Helium atom
  } experiment at max hits. Clear detector screen to make more observations.
 *[false] { $isEmitting ->
    [true] { $sourceType ->
      [photons] Photon
      [electrons] Electron
      [neutrons] Neutron
     *[heliumAtoms] Helium atom
    } experiment, detector pattern changed.
   *[false] Source off. { $sourceType ->
      [photons] Photon
      [electrons] Electron
      [neutrons] Neutron
     *[heliumAtoms] Helium atom
    } experiment ready to start.
  }
}

accessibleHelpText.value: Choose slit configuration for barrier.

accessibleContextResponse.value:
{ $slitSetting ->
  [bothOpen] In barrier, both slits open.
  [leftCovered] In barrier, left slit covered.
  [rightCovered] In barrier, right slit covered.
  [leftDetector] Detector added to left slit in barrier.
  [rightDetector] Detector added to right slit in barrier.
  [noBarrier] No barrier.
 *[bothDetectors] Detectors added to both slits in barrier.
}

accessibleHelpText.value: Choose screen or graph representation for data analysis.
Choose Electric Field or Amplitude display for photon wave.
Choose real part, imaginary part, or amplitude display for matter wave function.

accessibleHelpTextCollapsed.value: Explore a graph of the detector screen pattern.

accessibleContextResponseCollapsed.value:
{ $detectionMode ->
  [intensity] Intensity graph hidden.
 *[hits] Hits histogram hidden.
}

intensityOff.value: Graph is empty. Source is off.

intensity.value: Graph traces intensity versus position with tall central peak and smaller peaks on either side. { $spatialDescription }

intensitySingleSlit.value: Graph traces intensity versus position as a single broad peak centered on the graph, tapering smoothly toward the edges.

intensityNoBarrier.value: Graph traces uniform intensity versus position as a flat horizontal line.

hitsFew.value: A few bars have appeared at scattered positions across histogram.

hitsEmerging.value: Histogram growing. Some bars are becoming taller than others at repeated positions across graph.

hitsDeveloping.value: Taller bars are appearing at regular intervals, with shorter bars between them. { $spatialDescription }

hitsClear.value: Histogram shows a tall central peak with repeating side peaks and lower bars between them. { $spatialDescription }

hitsSingleSlitEmerging.value: Histogram growing, with taller bars near center and shorter bars toward edges.

hitsSingleSlitClear.value: Histogram shows a broad central peak that tapers toward edges. { $spatialDescription }

hitsNoBarrier.value: Histogram shows evenly distributed hits across graph.

zoomInAccessibleHelpText.value: Zoom in to see more detail of graph pattern.

zoomOutAccessibleHelpText.value: Zoom out to see more of graph pattern.

accessibleContextResponse.value: Maximum number of hits reached. Source is off. Clear detector screen to make more observations.

intensity.value:
Evenly spaced bright bands form across the screen. Bands are { $spacing ->
  [extremelyFarApart] extremely far apart
  [veryFarApart] very far apart
  [farApart] far apart
  [somewhatCloseTogether] somewhat close together
  [closeTogether] close together
  [veryCloseTogether] very close together
 *[extremelyCloseTogether] extremely close together
} across screen, { $envelope ->
  [clusteringIntoTwoFaintSections] clustering into two faint sections, directly across from slits
  [clusteringIntoTwoDistinctSections] clustering into two distinct sections, directly across from slits
 *[brightestAtCenter] brightest band at center
}.

intensitySingleSlit.value: Bright-band pattern is absent. Detector screen shows a wide central bright area, brightest in the middle and fading toward the edges. { $spatialDescription }

intensityNoBarrier.value: Plane wave fronts move directly to the detector screen. Uniform glow from plane wave fronts.

hitsNone.value: Detector screen is empty. No particles have arrived yet.

hitsFew.value: Individual scattered hits appear on the detector screen.

hitsEmerging.value: Hits begin forming faint bands on the detector screen.

hitsDeveloping.value:
Hits form evenly spaced bands on the detector screen. Bands are { $spacing ->
  [extremelyFarApart] extremely far apart
  [veryFarApart] very far apart
  [farApart] far apart
  [somewhatCloseTogether] somewhat close together
  [closeTogether] close together
  [veryCloseTogether] very close together
 *[extremelyCloseTogether] extremely close together
} across screen, { $envelope ->
  [clusteringIntoTwoFaintSections] clustering into two faint sections, directly across from slits
  [clusteringIntoTwoDistinctSections] clustering into two distinct sections, directly across from slits
 *[brightestAtCenter] brightest band at center
}.

hitsClear.value:
Hits form evenly spaced bands across the detector screen. Bands are { $spacing ->
  [extremelyFarApart] extremely far apart
  [veryFarApart] very far apart
  [farApart] far apart
  [somewhatCloseTogether] somewhat close together
  [closeTogether] close together
  [veryCloseTogether] very close together
 *[extremelyCloseTogether] extremely close together
} across screen, { $envelope ->
  [clusteringIntoTwoFaintSections] clustering into two faint sections, directly across from slits
  [clusteringIntoTwoDistinctSections] clustering into two distinct sections, directly across from slits
 *[brightestAtCenter] brightest band at center
}.

hitsSingleSlitEmerging.value: Bright-band pattern is absent. Hits collect in a broad region near the center of the screen, with fewer toward the edges.

hitsSingleSlitClear.value: Bright-band pattern is absent. Hits form a broad central area that tapers toward the edges. { $spatialDescription }

hitsNoBarrier.value: Evenly scattered hits appear across the detector screen.

snapshotHitsNone.value:
Detector screen is empty. { $hitCount ->
    [one] Detector screen shows a total of 1 hit.
   *[other] Detector screen shows a total of { $hitCount } hits.
} No particles have arrived yet.

snapshotHitsFew.value:
A handful of particles are visible at scattered positions across the screen. { $hitCount ->
    [one] Detector screen shows a total of 1 hit.
   *[other] Detector screen shows a total of { $hitCount } hits.
}

snapshotHitsEmerging.value:
More particles are appearing, and faint vertical stripes are becoming visible with gaps between them. { $hitCount ->
    [one] Detector screen shows a total of 1 hit.
   *[other] Detector screen shows a total of { $hitCount } hits.
}

snapshotHitsSingleSlitEmerging.value:
More particles are appearing in a broad region near the center of the screen, with fewer toward the edges. { $hitCount ->
    [one] Detector screen shows a total of 1 hit.
   *[other] Detector screen shows a total of { $hitCount } hits.
}

snapshotHitsNoBarrier.value:
Evenly scattered hits appear across the detector screen. { $hitCount ->
    [one] Detector screen shows a total of 1 hit.
   *[other] Detector screen shows a total of { $hitCount } hits.
}

}
